cards.title: Verify local tooling
cards.success: Report available and missing tools.

cards.title: Make Rust scaffold compile
cards.success: cargo fmt/check/test/clippy pass.

cards.title: Validate SSE mock
cards.success: Mock returns data: [DONE].

cards.title: Run direct k6 baseline
cards.success: RPS, P95, P99 and error rate recorded.

cards.title: Gateway health and ready
cards.success: healthz and readyz respond.

cards.title: Gateway mocked SSE
cards.success: Gateway stream contains [DONE].

cards.title: Proxy to mock upstream
cards.success: Client receives chunks from external mock through gateway.

cards.title: Minimal config
cards.success: Upstream base_url configurable.

cards.title: TTFT accumulator
cards.success: ttft_ms appears in final event.

cards.title: Telemetry queue overflow
cards.success: Overflow is tested and drops are counted.

cards.title: JSONL micro-batching
cards.success: Flush by time or size without blocking client.

cards.title: Ollama upstream
cards.success: Real stream works through gateway.

cards.title: vLLM parity runbook
cards.success: Direct and gateway results are recorded.

cards.title: GitHub PR draft
cards.success: PR draft created or auth/remote blocker reported.

cards.title: Performance review
cards.success: Concrete findings with file/line where possible.

cards.title: Docs consistency pass
cards.success: No contradiction about stack, license, gates or execution order.

cards.title: Context validation script
cards.success: Script passes, JSON is valid, critical files exist, no non-ASCII in main docs.

cards.title: Rewrite Mock in Rust
cards.success: Mock Rust compiles and responds to high concurrency SSE with keep-alive.

cards.title: Modularize main.rs
cards.success: main.rs is reduced to bootstrap; config, routes, stream, drain modules exist; tests pass.

cards.title: Setup WSL2 and Clean Benchmark
cards.success: k6 runs on WSL2, HTTP error rate < 0.1%, gateway RPS >= 98% of direct, results saved.

cards.title: Ollama Integration Test
cards.success: Real SSE reaches client, TTFT registered, errors mapped.

cards.title: Multi-upstream Configuration
cards.success: Configuration supports multiple upstreams with id, base_url, provider and priority; parse tests pass.

cards.title: Gateway Client-side Fallback & Failover
cards.success: Transparent redirect to fallback upstream on errors >= 400; unit test covers redirection.

cards.title: Upstream Health Check Workers
cards.success: Background worker updates healthy upstream list; gateway skips offline upstreams.
